summary: Meshy main-character output is recorded in the ledger as generated provenance, but final shipping should reverify Meshy account/output terms before production approval.
observations: Kenney Blaster Kit 2.1 is listed as Creative Commons CC0 by the official source.
The committed package includes a local LICENSE.txt beside the selected weapon assets.
docs/assets/source-ledger.json records source URL, download URL, hashes, byte counts, and redistribution flags.
Meshy-generated player.hero.gadget-gremlin source pack is recorded in docs/assets/source-ledger.json with provider terms metadata.
Generated source metadata is stored at tools/meshy/generated/meshy-gadget-gremlin/summary.json and contains no API keys.
OpenAI GPT Image 2 concept metadata is stored at docs/assets/openai-main-character-concepts.json.
decisions: Keep the current external weapon intake CC0-only.
Use npm run validate:assets as the local and CI provenance check.
Do not mark the Meshy character production-approved until account plan/output terms are explicitly reverified.
Keep Meshy source pack out of gameplay loading until license and optimization gates both pass.
caughtIssues: The project did not previously have a future FPS source ledger.
Meshy commercial/output rights differ by plan; this repo should verify paid/free plan status before final shipping.
Generated mascot concepts need originality review because similar platform-mascot silhouettes can drift toward existing IP.
risks: Future non-CC0 assets still need separate license review before import.
Meshy output terms and account plan need final verification before the generated character is shipped as a production asset.
